description: You are a graduate student who accidentally deleted 5 critical papers while cleaning up your library. Restore the following papers from the Trash and add them to the 'Thesis References' collection, ensuring existing items in the collection are preserved: 'A Mathematical Theory of Communication' (Shannon, 1948), 'Computing Machinery and Intelligence' (Turing, 1950), 'A Note on Two Problems in Connexion with Graphs' (Dijkstra, 1959), 'Attention Is All You Need' (Vaswani et al., 2017), and 'Generative Adversarial Nets' (Goodfellow et al., 2014).

trashed_titles: A Note on Two Problems in Connexion with Graphs
existing_titles: BERT: Pre-training of Deep Bidirectional Transformers for Language Understanding
